title: Page-driven component: section add on an existing page template
query: Provision the People Detail Masthead from its spec — it renders from page fields with no datasource. Draft the manifest and produce the offline plan and scaffold.
expected_behavior: Reads the flat provision.config.json at the top level because no build.config wrapper key is present.
Drafts a page-driven manifest that adds a section to the existing page template with a rendering that has no datasource.
Runs the offline plan and emits the page-driven TSX pair whose fields object is undefined behind an editing guard.
Represents each non-renderer field as a grep-able provision marker comment rather than inventing a control.
must_not: Attach a datasource template to a component the spec describes as page-driven.
Overwrite an existing TSX file without the force-tsx flag.
gap: Guards the page-driven branch so a no-datasource component keeps an undefined fields object and a section-add plan instead of a fabricated datasource.
